paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12 as of 2026-07-20, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. There have been no new news articles in the last 24 hours. Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's financials, governance concerns, and the departure of a director.

Recent news articles have focused on the company's financial performance, including a loss of $486 million and zero revenue, as well as the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Other articles have discussed the company's convertible notes offering and its potential impact on the stock price. The news articles are from sources such as Stocktwits, simplywall.st, and Yahoo Finance.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson. Another filing, a SCHEDULE 13D/A form, was submitted on 2026-07-08, and a DFAN14A form was filed on the same date, disclosing the withdrawal of a solicitation to call a special meeting of shareholders. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
